Articles

Overview

Why clade?
Biological Scenarios: A Discovery Guide
Getting started with clade
Your first research project with clade
Troubleshooting and FAQ
Parameter Reference
Parameter-space search at scale (parallel, resumable, streaming)
Custom Modules: Extending clade with Per-Tick Hooks

Parameter search

Automated tools for finding parameter combinations that produce target evolutionary outcomes. Start with the introduction for when/why/which algorithm; then pick the agent-level or environment-level guide depending on what you’re tuning; or go straight to the algorithm reference.

Parameter search — introduction
Parameter search — agent-level parameters
Parameter search — environment-level parameters
Parameter search — algorithms

Kernel as biology

Side-by-side reading of the simulation kernel — Julia code on the left, plain-English explanation and biological rationale on the right. Read these to understand the rules of the simulation as biology, spot inconsistencies, and find places where the model could be more realistic.

Kernel as biology — overview
tick.jl — one tick in the life of an agent
Clade.jl — the main loop, in biological order
sense.jl — what an agent perceives
reproduce.jl — birth, inheritance, parental cost
death.jl — when agents die and why
genome.jl — meiosis, traits, inheritance
